name: Zee22780
html:
❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤
Zee22780
css: .zee-card { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffe0f0 0%, #ffb6d9 50%, #ff80bf 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; box-sizing: border-box; } .hearts-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; } .zee-card .h { position: absolute; font-size: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 2rem); animation: float-heart 4s ease-in-out infinite; opacity: 0.5; color: #ff4da6; } .h1 { left: 5%; top: 10%; animation-delay: 0s; } .h2 { left: 20%; top: 70%; animation-delay: 0.5s; } .h3 { left: 40%; top: 15%; animation-delay: 1s; } .h4 { left: 60%; top: 60%; animation-delay: 1.5s; } .h5 { left: 75%; top: 10%; animation-delay: 0.3s; } .h6 { left: 85%; top: 75%; animation-delay: 0.8s; } .h7 { left: 50%; top: 80%; animation-delay: 1.2s; } .h8 { left: 10%; top: 45%; animation-delay: 1.8s; } @keyframes float-heart { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); opacity: 0.5; } 50% { transform: translateY(-14px) scale(1.2); opacity: 0.9; } } .name-text { font-family: Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 6vw, 2.8rem); font-weight: bold; color: #cc007a; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #ff80bf, 0 2px 0 #fff; letter-spacing: 0.05em; position: relative; z-index: 1; text-align: center; padding: 0 8%; }
